headline: Bank Of America Upgrade Reframes ON Semiconductor Buyback And Valuation Story
summary: Bank of America Securities upgraded ON Semiconductor (NasdaqGS:ON) to a Buy rating, citing the company's AI oriented product pipeline and focus on power semiconductors for automotive and industrial uses. The company announced an aggressive $6b share buyback plan, signaling a renewed capital return approach to shareholders. ON Semiconductor is preparing for leadership changes, with a Group President expected to resign in June 2026. ON Semiconductor enters this phase of change with its share...
